intro.p: Two forces act on a single point.

content.p: Force X has magnitude {{F1}} pounds and force Y has magnitude {{F2}} pounds. The angle between the two forces is {{theta}}^\circ.

(a) Find the magnitude of the equilibrant.
(b) Find the angle between the equilibrant and the {{F1}}-pound force.
Round answers to the nearest tenth.

outtro.p: The magnitude of the equilibrant is {{R}} pounds.
The angle between the equilibrant and the {{F1}}-pound force is {{phi}}^\circ.
